description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine SET_OSSCAN_2, and is implemented by a call to SET_OSSCAN_2. Use this API to enable or disable the simulation option setting that scans for out-of-step conditions using a generic relay. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr = set_osscan_2(status, trip, exclxfmr) ierr, status,trip,exclxfmr = set_osscan_2()
python_syntax: ierr = set_osscan_2(status, trip, exclxfmr) ierr, status,trip,exclxfmr = set_osscan_2()

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Option setting. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

parameters.name: trip
parameters.description: Monitor or trip flag. (input; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: exclxfmr
parameters.description: Flag to include or exclude transformer for out-of-step check. (input; unchanged by default).

exclxfmr.description: do not exclude (i.e., include) transformer in out-of-step scan.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
